narrative:
Caldwell One/Two (precinct in Noble County) has 597 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
